channel.title: 2026-06-30 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-06-30 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: mCGCNN：用于高效预测晶体材料磁性质的双流晶体图卷积神经网络
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sourav Mal, Satadeep Bhattacharjee
该工作提出面向磁性的晶体图神经网络 mCGCNN，在完整结构图之外引入专门的磁性子图，以区分载磁矩亚晶格和非磁性配体环境。磁性分支基于金属–配体–金属交换路径和键角描述符进行消息传递，并通过跨层耦合吸收结构与配体场信息，同时采用磁性亚晶格池化避免磁相互作用被非磁原子稀释。在 Materials Project 自旋极化 DFT 数据上的测试显示，mCGCNN 将总磁矩预测 MAE 从 CGCNN 的 2.54 μB 降至 2.02 μB，R² 从 0.644 提升至 0.776；经磁矩回归预训练后，其表征还可改善铁磁/反铁磁分类任务。

item.title: 利用图神经网络代理建模增材制造短纤维热塑性材料的静态响应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Pharindra Pathak (Auburn University, Oakridge National Lab, NASA Glenn Research Center, Auburn University, Auburn University), Vipin Kumar (Auburn University, Oakridge National Lab, NASA Glenn Research Center, Auburn University, Auburn University), Trenton M. Ricks (Auburn University, Oakridge National Lab, NASA Glenn Research Center, Auburn University, Auburn University), Suhasini Gururaja (Auburn University, Oakridge National Lab, NASA Glenn Research Center, Auburn University, Auburn University), Siddhartha Srivastava (Auburn University, Oakridge National Lab, NASA Glenn Research Center, Auburn University, Auburn University)
该工作面向增材制造并压缩模塑的短纤维热塑性复合材料，提出数据驱动代理模型以预测其力学行为。作者将微纳 CT 重构的三维微结构离散为基于 Voronoi 的单元，用以表示不同纤维相互作用邻域，并通过包含基体损伤的非线性有限元模拟对单元进行均匀化。该框架旨在绕开真实三维非均匀微结构直接有限元计算的高昂代价，用图神经网络学习纤维取向、空间聚集和孔隙等中尺度特征对刚度、损伤起始和非线性变形的影响。

item.title: 利用自主大语言模型研究循环优化专家设计晶体图网络以预测带隙
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Chenmu Zhang, Boris I. Yakobson
该工作以 MatBench 带隙基准中超过十万种晶体为对象，考察通用代码智能体能否自主优化材料性质预测模型。在无外部预训练的条件下，该智能体构建的模型精度超过该任务中已报道的十七个专家设计模型。进一步分析表明，其改进主要来自实现已有机器学习与晶体神经网络方法，例如消息传递边上的元素对特征和空间群嵌入；论文同时讨论了这类自主研究流程的能力边界。

item.title: 高熵硼化物的可合成性与力学性质：第一性原理和机器学习研究
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Luke Moore, Ethan Fox, Bria Storr, Jayden R. Palomino, Shane A. Catledge, Yogesh K. Vohra, Cheng-Chien Chen
该工作用密度泛函理论研究 AlB2 六方结构中的五金属高熵硼化物，遍历 9 种 4–6 族过渡金属元素形成的 126 种组合。作者采用熵形成能力描述符评估单相可合成性，并发现预测与若干实验数据吻合较好；同时用特殊准随机结构计算力学性质。结果显示若干主要含 Cr 的化合物机械不稳定且可合成性较低，并进一步通过机器学习模型总结规律，为筛选力学性能优异的单相高熵硼化物提供路线图。

item.title: New superconductors identified, unlocking process that could yield thousands more
item.description:
📚 Physics News
An international team of quantum researchers has shown how machine learning can be used to filter a practically infinite number of possible material combinations to identify candidates for superconductivity. Thanks to the breakthrough, new superconductors can now be found much faster, says Aalto University Professor Päivi Törmä, who leads the SuperC consortium behind the research.

item.title: 用于免迭代结构弛豫的高阶张量神经网络
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shaobo Yu, Haoting Zhang, Yu Han, Zhennan Zhang, Zhiyue Guo, Junjie Wang, Hao Gao, Jian Sun
该工作提出 HotRelax，一种高阶张量消息传递神经网络，用于从未弛豫结构一次前向预测弛豫后结构。模型直接用未弛豫—弛豫结构对训练，不需要 DFT 力标签，也不依赖迭代推理或后处理。跨三维体晶、二维层状材料和催化剂等五类数据集的测试显示，HotRelax 相比现有端到端弛豫模型具有竞争力，在若干基准上误差更低、模型更紧凑且推理高效；DFT 复算进一步表明其预测结构能量接近 DFT 弛豫结果。

item.title: Machine learning enhanced data assimilation framework for multiscale carbonate rock characterization
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zhenkai Bo, Ahmed H. Elsheikh, Hannah P. Menke, Julien Maes, Sebastian Geiger, Muhammad Z. Kashim, Zainol A. A. Bakar, Kamaljit Singh
arXiv:2602.06989v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Carbonate reservoirs offer significant capacity for subsurface carbon storage, oil production, and underground hydrogen storage. X-ray computed tomography (X-ray CT) coupled with numerical simulations is commonly used to investigate the multiphase flow behaviors in carbonate rocks. Carbonates exhibit pore size distribution across scales, hindering the comprehensive investigation with conventional X-ray CT images. Imaging samples at both macro and micro-scales (multi-scale imaging) proved to be a viable option in this context. However, multi-scale imaging faces two key limitations: the trade-off between field of view and voxel size necessitates resource-intensive imaging, while multi-scale multi-physics numerical simulations on resulting…

item.title: 基于物理引导傅里叶表示神经网络的地震全波形反演
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Gui Chen, Yang Liu, Haoran Zhang, Mi Zhang
该工作提出一种用于无监督声学全波形反演和同时震源全波形反演的物理引导傅里叶表示神经网络，将傅里叶变换后的地震数据嵌入潜在空间，并结合软化 log-cosh 损失与物理引导优化器更新速度模型。在 Overthrust 模型上的数值实验表明，该方法相较传统 L2 损失和 SALC 损失 FWI 具有更高反演精度，并对噪声和较差初始模型更稳健。

item.title: 结构化环境中排斥斯格明子的扩散不对称性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xichao Zhang, Charles Reichhardt, Cynthia J. O. Reichhardt, Qiming Shao, Rui Zhang, Yan Zhou, Yongbing Xu, Masahito Mochizuki
该工作研究磁性斯格明子在结构化腔室中的非对称扩散，强调斯格明子—斯格明子和斯格明子—环境排斥相互作用对扩散行为的决定性作用。通过构造偏心非对称闸门连接两个腔室，作者发现斯格明子穿过闸门时可表现出依赖闸门对称性、开口宽度和斯格明子密度的非对称扩散。尽管扩散受密度影响，模拟总体符合假设时间无关扩散率的速率方程；相互作用斯格明子还可瞬时形成“键”，诱发该体系特有的旋转动力学。

item.title: CoZr₂Hₓ 中氢在超导相与铁磁相中的不同作用
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yuto Watanabe, Takayoshi Katase, Daisuke Takegami, Yoshikazu Mizuguchi
作者合成了不同含氢量的 CoZr₂Hₓ，发现氢进入样品时存在两个由宽成分间隙分隔的区域：低氢含量超导相（x=0–0.054）和高氢含量铁磁相（x=2.786）。高氢相中，Zr–H 相互作用显著重构穿越费米能级的金属能带并诱导铁磁性；低氢相中，氢主要表现为不改变能带结构的非磁性杂质。尽管低氢系列的德拜温度几乎不变，超导转变温度随氢含量增加而降低，并可由 Abrikosov–Gor'kov 破对理论定量描述。

item.title: 由主动机器人组成的磁性鞭毛中拍动的涌现
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Francisca Guzmán-Lastra, Daniel Hernández, Nicolás Quintriqueo, Enkeleida Lushi, Erick Burgos
该工作研究由厘米尺度振动机器人和嵌入钕磁偶极构成的磁性自推进粒子链中鞭毛拍动的涌现。单端锚定并启动自推进后，链内纵向应力累积直至超过磁弯曲刚度，引发屈曲不稳定并驱动持续拍动。实验与数值模拟识别出直链、稳定鞭毛拍动和裂解三种动力学区间，其由主动力、链长和磁弯曲刚度竞争控制；拍动起始对应超临界 Hopf 分岔，且所需初始错位由磁力矩与转动噪声平衡设定。

item.title: Hubbard 模型中的铁磁有序
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wojciech Niedziółka, Jacek Wojtkiewicz
该文讨论 Hubbard 模型基态中铁磁有序的理论判据，重点关注晶格结构对铁磁形成的作用。作者基于相互作用费米子基态能量的密度展开公式，并假设类似展开可推广到若干非简单立方晶格，将其应用于包括面心立方晶格在内的五种受挫晶格。分析支持这样一种观点：简单立方晶格上铁磁有序不易出现，而受挫晶格即使在低磁矩载流子密度下也可能自然产生铁磁性。

item.title: 窄带体系中的铁磁性与反铁磁性：量子几何和能带色散的竞争
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Haoyu Hu, Oskar Vafek, Kristjan Haule, B. Andrei Bernevig
该文提出统一理论框架研究窄带中的自旋物理，聚焦电子关联、量子几何与能带色散如何共同决定磁有序。通过推导有效自旋模型，作者指出窄带非原子极限波函数通常倾向于稳定铁磁序，而能带色散则促进反铁磁关联。二者竞争可产生可调磁相和丰富自旋现象，为系统分析窄带材料磁性提供了同时纳入波函数、能带结构与关联效应的方法。

item.title: 铁电体中的铁振子霍尔效应：热梯度驱动的横向极化累积
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Daniel A. Bustamante Lopez, Verena Brehm, Dominik M. Juraschek
作者理论提出，当被霍尔效应偏转的晶格激发携带电偶极矩时，其横向运动可在铁电材料中产生电极化累积，并将该机制称为铁振子霍尔效应。该效应由携带极化的晶格激发即 ferrons 驱动，可视为横向输运中与磁振子相对应的电极化载体。基于密度泛函理论参数的原子尺度晶格动力学计算，论文以典型铁电体 BaTiO3 展示了这一效应，并提出通过热和磁场操控铁性序的新途径。

item.title: 中心对称反铁磁体 EuAuAs 中的场诱导拓扑霍尔效应与蝴蝶形磁阻
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yu Zhang, Junfa Lin, Huan Wang, Kun Han, Yiting Wang, Xue Dong, Zhenfeng Guan, Shengdi Xi, Tian-Long Xia
该工作系统研究反铁磁体 EuAuAs 的磁性与输运性质，发现当磁场分别平行 ab 面和 c 轴时反铁磁转变温度约为 5.7 K 和 6.3 K，且 H∥ab 时伴随变磁转变和小磁滞。在反铁磁态、H∥ab 且电流 I∥c 条件下，输运测量显示显著拓扑霍尔效应，可能源于有限标量自旋手性。磁阻还表现出蝴蝶形磁滞和强角度依赖，表明场诱导自旋纹理、磁畴演化、畴壁钉扎及自旋相关散射对磁输运具有重要作用。

item.title: 过渡金属二硫族化物超导体中临界磁场的低温反常与各向异性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Tomoya Sano, Kota Tabata, Akihiro Sasaki, Yasuhiro Asano
该工作解释了单层过渡金属二硫族化物中自旋单态超导为何能在超过 Pauli 极限的高磁场下保持稳定。作者指出所谓 Ising 保护源于 Zeeman 场和 Ising 自旋轨道耦合两个磁活性势，它们会在自旋单态超导体中诱导两类自旋三重态配对关联。仅由 Zeeman 场产生的奇频三重态配对会使超导态不稳定，而由两个磁势相互作用产生的偶频三重态配对可抵消这种不稳定性。超流权重的解析表达表明，诱导的偶频自旋三重态 Cooper 对支撑了高 Zeeman 场下的自旋单态超导，并解释了 Ising 保护的各向异性。

item.title: 候选 d 波交替磁体中不同磁构型的实空间识别
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jin-Cheng Gu, Mingzhe Hu, Ziyin Song, Lihan Wang, Lihong Wang, Junming Zhang, Jiali Zhao, Hang Li, Shifeng Jin, Xin-Ding Zhang, Genfu Chen, Hongming Weng, Zhongxu Wei, Tian Qian
交替磁性表现为零净磁化下的动量依赖自旋劈裂，但类似能带特征可能来自不同实空间磁序。该工作在候选 d 波交替磁体 KV2Se2O 中结合自旋极化扫描隧道显微术与磁场依赖准粒子干涉成像，在原子尺度解析 V2O 层内棋盘状反平行自旋纹理及跨单胞台阶的层间自旋排列。作者识别出 C 型和 G 型两类磁构型，指出二者都可产生相近的自旋劈裂电子结构，从而解释该材料磁性起源争议。

item.title: 热应变畴工程实现硅兼容理想反铁电性及大数字式机电响应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hao Xiong, Huazhang Zhang, Liang Shu, Yangyang Si, Jiaqi Liu, Chao Zhou, Rui Zhang, Jingxuan Li, Jinyang Li, Chhavi Rastogi, Hao Pan, Bin Xu, Er-Jia Guo, Yunlong Tang, Sujit Das, Philippe Ghosez, Qian Li, Jing-Feng Li, Zuhuang Chen
该工作利用硅衬底与外延 PbZrO3 薄膜之间的热失配，将通常不利的热应变转化为稳定理想反铁电性的设计手段。理论与实验表明，热拉伸应变稳定 (004)o 畴并促成直接一步式反极性—极性切换，而压缩应变稳定的 (240)o 畴需经中间亚铁电态切换。所得薄膜呈现近零剩余极化、方形双电滞回线、约 75 ns 的快速切换、约 0.6% 的可逆电应变和稳健工作窗口，为硅基反铁电纳米器件集成提供路径。

item.title: 室温范德华铁磁体 Fe3GaTe2 中超快磁性的应变工程
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Fan Fei, Yangchen He, Wuzhang Fang, Jessica Kienbaum, Jacopo Simoni, Robert Boyd, Yuan Ping, Daniel A. Rhodes, Jun Xiao
该工作展示了在室温范德华铁磁体 Fe3GaTe2 中通过连续单轴拉伸应变调控平衡磁响应和超快退磁动力学。最高 4.2% 拉伸应变使矫顽场从接近零提高到 100 Oe，表明有效垂直磁各向异性增强。时间分辨磁光 Kerr 测量显示，1.2% 拉伸应变可使特征退磁时间缩短约 20%，并进入单纯提高无应变样品泵浦通量无法达到的加速退磁区间；结合第一性原理计算，作者将其归因于应变对自旋–晶格能量耦合的调制。

item.title: 反铁磁体中的应变驱动畴壁运动
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Diego De Gusem, Arnaud Nizet, Bartel Van Waeyenberge
作者推导了法向应变作用下反铁磁畴壁运动的方程，发现畴壁倾向迁移至 εxx 较高且 εzz 较低的位置。不同应变分量在相同应变轮廓下给出不同终端速度，原因是 εxx 与 εzz 对畴壁宽度的调制方向相反。解析模型与 mumax+ 对应变梯度、振荡应变和瑞利波等情形的模拟符合良好，并展示了驻表面声波用于赛道存储纠错的潜力。

item.title: 三维光晶格中排斥费米子的热熵、密度无序与反铁磁性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yu-Feng Song, Youjin Deng, Yuan-Yao He
该工作针对近期三维费米 Hubbard 光晶格实验中反铁磁结构因子和临界熵峰值出现在 U/t≈11.75、显著高于理论预期 U/t≈8 的现象，利用数值精确辅助场量子蒙特卡洛研究半填充三维 Hubbard 模型中热熵、密度无序与反铁磁性的耦合。作者构建了精确熵相图，可模拟温度—相互作用平面上的任意等熵路径并跟踪实验参数。结果表明，该差异可由实验中随相互作用增强产生的熵增加以及光晶格密度无序共同定量解释。

item.title: Andreev Reflection to Probe Momentum-Dependent Spin Polarization in Altermagnet CrSb
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 Yan Zhang, Yixuan Luo, Yue Yang, Zilong Li, Weilong Qiu, Lunhui Hu, Yuanfeng Xu, Yanfeng Guo, Chao Cao, and Xin Lu
Author(s): Yan Zhang, Yixuan Luo, Yue Yang, Zilong Li, Weilong Qiu, Lunhui Hu, Yuanfeng Xu, Yanfeng Guo, Chao Cao, and Xin Lu Altermagnetic materials have recently emerged as promising candidates for next-generation spintronic applications, characterized by the k-dependent spin-splitted band structure and a simultaneous zero-net-magnetization. Among them, altermagnetic candidate CrSb has attracted considerable a… [Phys. Rev. Lett. 137, 016701] Published Tue Jun 30, 2026

item.title: Magnon fluctuations find a structure
item.description:
📚 Nature Physics
👤 Hossein Taghinejad, Mohammad Taghinejad
Nature Physics, Published online: 30 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41567-026-03354-9 Thermal magnon fluctuations can be selectively redistributed through a process known as squeezing, a phenomenon now observed in magnetic insulators driven into a non-equilibrium state.

item.title: Orbital Altermagnetism in Two Dimensions
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 Mingxiang Pan, Feng Liu, and Huaqing Huang
Author(s): Mingxiang Pan, Feng Liu, and Huaqing Huang We introduce the concept of orbital altermagnetism , a symmetry-protected magnetic order of pure orbital degrees of freedom. It is characterized with ordered antiparallel orbital magnetic moments in real space but momentum-dependent orbital band splittings, analogous to spin altermagnetism. Using a m… [Phys. Rev. Lett. 137, 016702] Published Tue Jun 30, 2026

item.title: 用于高效仿真的纳米光子神经网络维度扩展方法
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shuo Huang, Mahsa Torfeh, Lujia Zhong, Michelle L. Povinelli, Owen D. Miller, Chia Wei Hsu
该工作提出维度扩展网络 DEN，一种完全无监督且仿真高效的纳米光子逆向设计框架。DEN 将低维设计目标转化为结构化高维条件表示，以缓解低维目标与高维纳米光子结构之间的表征不匹配，并通过可微电磁仿真实现端到端训练，无需预生成数据集。作者在自由形状金属透镜和非对称 Y 分束器设计中验证该方法，显示其可获得与伴随优化相当的设计性能并降低对大规模数据集的依赖。

item.title: Towards Generalizable and Evidential Nuclear Magnetic Resonance-Based Molecular Structure Elucidation via Large Language Model Agent
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zheng Fang, Chen Yang, Yusen Tan, Yunpeng Zhao, Fanjie Xu, Hongxin Xiang, Hanyu Sun, Hanyu Gao, Xiaojian Wang, Wenjie Du, Yuqiang Li, Jun Xia
arXiv:2606.29776v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Nuclear Magnetic Resonance (NMR) spectroscopy is the gold standard for molecular structure elucidation, yet interpreting complex spectra for unknown molecules remains a bottleneck reliant on human expertise. While artificial intelligence has advanced this field, current methods face a critical trade-off: database retrieval cannot identify novel scaffolds, while de novo molecular structure elucidation models operate as black boxes, lacking the atom-level interpretability required for rigorous scientific validation. Here, we present NMRAgent, an evidential reasoning agent powered by large language models (LLMs) that bridges this gap by integrating specialized spectral analysis tools with chemical knowledge graphs. Unlike previous approaches, N…

item.title: Kagome edge states under lattice termination, spin-orbit coupling, and magnetic order
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Sajid Sekh, Annica M. Black-Schaffer, and Andrzej Ptok
Author(s): Sajid Sekh, Annica M. Black-Schaffer, and Andrzej Ptok We study the edge state properties of a two-dimensional kagome lattice using a tight-binding approach, focusing on the role of lattice termination, spin-orbit coupling, and magnetic order. In the pristine limit, we show that the existence of localized edge states is highly sensitive to boundary geom… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 235436] Published Tue Jun 30, 2026

item.title: Local probe evidence supporting altermagnetism in Co₁/₄NbSe₂
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 J. N. Graham, T. J. Hicken, Resham Babu Regmi, M. Janoschek, I. Mazin, H. Luetkens, N. J. Ghimire, and Z. Guguchia
Author(s): J. N. Graham, T. J. Hicken, Resham Babu Regmi, M. Janoschek, I. Mazin, H. Luetkens, N. J. Ghimire, and Z. Guguchia Muon spin rotation (μ⁺SR) was used to investigate the magnetic properties of cobalt-intercalated 2H−NbSe₂ (Co₁/₄NbSe₂). Co₁/₄NbSe₂ is predicted to be an altermagnet, and while neutron diffraction has proposed… [Phys. Rev. Research 8, 023361] Published Tue Jun 30, 2026

item.title: Magnetic and electric properties of the metallic kagome antiferromagnet CrRhAs
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Materials
👤 Franziska Breitner, Bin Shen, Anton Jesche, Alexander A. Tsirlin, and Philipp Gegenwart
Author(s): Franziska Breitner, Bin Shen, Anton Jesche, Alexander A. Tsirlin, and Philipp Gegenwart Antiferromagnetic kagome metals remain far less explored than their ferromagnetic counterparts, despite predictions of unconventional spin textures and emergent transport phenomena. Here, the authors report the growth of single crystals of the metallic kagome antiferromagnet CrRhAs and investigate its magnetic and electronic properties. While no nonlinear Hall effect is observed, Hall measurements reveal an unexpected sign reversal upon changing the current direction, together with a pronounced enhancement below the antiferromagnetic transition. These findings point to a strong coupling between magnetic order and an anisotropic electronic structure, highlighting CrRhAs as a promising platfor…

item.title: The influence of chirality on the macroscopic behavior of multiferroic smectic phases
item.description:
📚 The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue
We study the influence of chirality on various types of multiferroic phases, which show simultaneously liquid crystalline order, as well as long range electric or magnetic order, including the possibilities of ferro, antiferro, and conical forms. The main focus is on the chiral ferroelectric smectic CF* phase. This includes a discussion of possible ground states, including defect phases not considered before. We present the macroscopic dynamics of the simplest possible ground state, namely a helix superposed on the ferroelectric structure of smectic C F with C 1 h symmetry, thus leading to triclinic C 1 symmetry. A combination of linear irreversible thermodynamics and symmetry arguments is used to derive the resulting dynamic equations applicable at sufficiently low frequencies and long w…

item.title: Topological properties of the high-pressure hydride superconductor bismuth dihydride BiH₂
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Materials
👤 Ning-Ning Zhao, Zi-Wen Meng, Shu-Feng Zhang, and Chang-Wen Zhang
Author(s): Ning-Ning Zhao, Zi-Wen Meng, Shu-Feng Zhang, and Chang-Wen Zhang Topological properties and topological superconductivity in real materials have attracted intensive experimental and theoretical attentions recently. The topological electronic properties of pressure-induced superconductors BiH₂ have been studied based on first-principles electronic … [Phys. Rev. Materials 10, 064203] Published Tue Jun 30, 2026

item.title: 零记忆量子点储备计算的几何方法
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Bongsu Kim, Oscar Lee, Sangjun Jeon, Kun Woo Kim
该工作提出利用计算中的时空折衷，在本征无记忆物理体系中通过外部空间自由度工程化记忆容量。作者采用多维输入节点作为空间记忆轴，并以广义量子点的离散能级提供强非线性，通过数值模拟验证该零记忆量子储备在 Mackey–Glass 混沌预测和非线性变换任务中的高性能。对量子态轨迹几何的分析表明，外源记忆通过构造类似滞回的状态空间结构实现历史信息编码。

item.title: 纳米石墨烯自旋链中非均匀海森堡哈密顿量的学习
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Greta Lupi, Saketh Ravuri, Chenxiao Zhao, Weidan Zhang, Cesare Roncaglia, Renxiang Liu, Xinliang Feng, Daniele Passerone, Pascal Ruffieux, Roman Fasel, Jose L. Lado, Gonçalo Catarina
该工作面向从实验数据反推微观哈密顿量的问题，提出一种局域且与链长无关的机器学习方法，从非弹性扫描隧道谱图中重构空间调制的交换相互作用。作者将其用于纳米石墨烯自旋链，识别出近均匀和明显非均匀的交换耦合区域。重构的有效模型能定量再现实验谱并恢复激发能隙随体系尺寸的正确标度，为连接局域谱学测量与多体哈密顿量提供通用策略。

item.title: Informational Frustration in Neural Manifolds: Shannon Bottlenecks and the Limits of Learnability
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Srinivasa Rao P., Vangmayi P Reddy
arXiv:2606.30512v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Why overparameterised deep networks generalise so remarkably well remains one of the most stubborn open questions in machine learning theory. Classical frameworks like VC dimension and Rademacher complexity predict catastrophic overfitting in modern models, leaving a massive theoretical gap between theory and reality. In this paper, we bridge this divide by introducing a unified framework that links information theory, topology, and statistical mechanics to map the hard limits of deep learning. Central to our approach is the Entropic Learnability Horizon (ELH): a fundamental law stating that a network can only truly learn a target function if the Shannon entropy of the data manifold outpaces the topological entropy of the function's decision…

item.title: 基于超导微线神经元的模式识别
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Khalil Harrabi, Leonardo Cadorim, Milorad Milosevic
该工作将带电阻分流的超导微线作为最小人工神经元，用于时间型神经形态计算。实验和模拟表明，该器件通过电阻开关与弛豫动力学的耦合产生尖峰电压响应，其阈值、放电频率和不应期可由外加电流、温度与分流电阻调控。作者进一步通过对单个神经元产生的时间电压信号进行突触训练展示神经网络操作，使可训练时间权重直接作用于动态尖峰响应而非静态输出，从而利用超导尖峰的完整时间结构进行计算。

item.title: 面向物理信息学习与离散 PDE 伴随的经验证残差专用显式导数核
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wenbo Cao, Zhe Lu, Weiwei Zhang
该工作重新审视显式微分在科学计算中的作用，目标是降低物理信息神经网络高阶残差、CFD 残差雅可比作用和离散伴随算子中通用自动微分带来的运行时间与内存开销。作者提出残差专用的 partial-jet 传播方法，将目标 PDE 残差所需的导数状态闭包显式化，并通过专用逐层核实现，而不是依赖嵌套 AD 或通用 Taylor 模式变换。数值验证显示，这些显式导数核可与嵌套 AD 在浮点精度水平一致，同时利用问题结构实现更可控、高效的导数计算。

item.title: Accelerating Two-Dimensional Computational Fluid Dynamics via Hybrid Spectral-Geometric Neural Architectures
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Carlos Andrés Angulo Rosales
Computationally resolving fluid dynamics around complex, irregular boundaries remains a central challenge in computational physics due to the multi-scale nature of complex fluid interactions. Fully resolving these dynamics through traditional projection solvers is computationally prohibitive for real-time applications, motivating data-driven machine learning alternatives. In this work, we propose a novel hybrid neural architecture for large-scale fluid simulation that combines the localized feature extraction capabilities of convolutional networks with the global wave-resolution efficiency of spectral methods. We introduce a dual-engine bottleneck that disentangles the problem space: a Geometric Soft Attention Routing mechanism captures high-frequency boundary friction, while a 2D Spectra…

item.title: 通过化学途径调控无限层镍酸盐中的磁场重入超导竞争
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Haowen Han, Yusong Zhao, Yi Bian, Tong Ma, Wenlong Yang, Shaohua Yang, Binghui Ge, Hongliang Dong, Chuanying Xi, Ze Wang, Nuofu Chen, Tian Shang, Toni Shiroka, Zaher Salman, Jia-Cai Nie, Ho-Kwang Mao, Jikun Chen
该研究发展了制备 Eu 掺杂及多种稀土组合无限层镍酸盐的化学路线，探索高 Tc 超导与磁场重入超导之间的 4f 相关量子竞争。作者在超导穹顶边界观察到具有单轴各向异性的稳健磁场重入超导，并将其归因于 Eu2+ 4f7 相关的磁涨落促配对与交换场相互作用之间的竞争。通过调节 RE/RE' 稀土磁性，可进一步改变相关量子临界行为，既可增强重入性，也可提高 Tc 和临界电流密度。

item.title: 确定固态自旋缺陷跃迁偶极偏振的统一框架
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Gaia Da Prato, Yong Yu, Wolfgang Tittel, Simon Gröblacher
该文提出一种从系综光谱直接重构自旋 1/2 固态缺陷电偶极跃迁偏振的框架，联合利用光致发光谱对磁场、光学偏振和应变的响应。应用于硅中铒离子这一含多个晶体学子位点的复杂体系时，该方法将非对称系综谱归因于应变诱导能移，并同时确定光学偶极偏振和应变-轨道耦合张量。所得模型可预测腔-离子耦合对晶向和磁场方向的依赖，并由单铒离子纳米腔耦合实验加以验证。

item.title: 铁弹体中的双线性挠曲-反铁畸变耦合：极性孪晶、反相边界与交替电性的指纹
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Eugene A. Eliseev, Anna N. Morozovska, Venkatraman Gopalan
该工作基于 Landau–Ginsburg–Devonshire 理论指出，电极化矢量与反铁畸变长程序赝矢量之间的线性梯度型 Lifshitz 不变量，即双线性挠曲-反铁畸变耦合，在所有反铁畸变铁弹体中由对称性允许。四子晶格模型表明，即使不存在铁电或反铁电有序，该耦合也可在孪晶壁和反相边界诱导对子晶格敏感的极化。诱导极化垂直于反铁畸变序参量，并在相邻子晶格中反向排列，可能对应交替电性型四极电序；但其物理表现通常在许多纳米结构反铁畸变铁电体中不易显现。

item.title: 相干与非相干界面自旋输运：自旋超流中的量子—经典交叉
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 A. R. Moura, L. S. L. Barbosa
该工作研究正常金属/铁磁绝缘体/正常金属三层结构中的界面自旋输运热力学，其中磁性层由各向异性量子 XXZ 模型描述。作者结合自洽谐波近似和微观线性响应理论，计算不同自旋区间的界面自旋混合电导，并将其分解为由自旋超流宏观相位驱动的相干凝聚贡献和由热磁振子随机涨落介导的非相干贡献。在 S=1/2 的强量子极限下，相干项随温度快速下降并在有限相干温度消失；涨落项在零温为零、低温呈 T² 标度，并随 1/S 振幅抑制，揭示了量子多体涨落到经典自旋超流描述之间的过渡。

item.title: 通过自旋极化准粒子干涉直接观察磁隧道结中的界面交换耦合
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xu Wang, Chenxi Wang, Ying Yang, Yining Hu, Qingle Zhang, Chen Chen, Donglai Feng, Tong Zhang
该研究利用自旋极化扫描隧道显微镜和准粒子干涉，在由 Fe 覆盖探针与 Cr(001) 表面构成的磁隧道结中直接观测界面交换耦合。作者发现铁磁探针可使 Cr(001) 自旋极化表面态发生显著能量位移，最大约 10 meV。该位移对探针–表面距离以及 Fe 探针与 Cr 表面之间的自旋相对取向高度敏感，且可由外磁场切换，说明扩展二维表面态能够跨异质结介导强交换耦合并实现局域调控。

item.title: Physics-Informed Neural Quantum Control for Extended Rovibrational Photoassociation in a Morse Molecular System
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Murilo D. Forlevesi, Emanuel Fernandes de Lima, Edson Denis Leonel
arXiv:2606.29610v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present a Physics-Informed Neural Quantum Control (PINQC) framework for rovibrational photoassociation in a Morse molecular system. The proposed method combines neural-network-based laser-field generation with differentiable quantum propagation, allowing optimized laser pulses to be obtained directly from the underlying quantum dynamics without requiring external training data. The optimized control fields efficiently transfer an initially continuum-like Gaussian wave packet into the vibrational ground-state level, promoting continuum-to-bound population transfer through coherent rovibrational dynamics. The resulting photoassociation process involves both vibrational stabilization and rotational redistribution arising naturally from dip…

item.title: Neural-Network-Assisted Bayesian Qubit Readout at the Single-Photon Level for Scalable Atomic Quantum Processors
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 Yaoting Zhou, Weisen Wang, Zhuangzhuang Tian, Bin Huang, Huancheng Chen, Donghao Li, Zhongxiao Xu, Li Chen, and Heng Shen
Author(s): Yaoting Zhou, Weisen Wang, Zhuangzhuang Tian, Bin Huang, Huancheng Chen, Donghao Li, Zhongxiao Xu, Li Chen, and Heng Shen Quantum state readout with minimal resources is crucial for scalable quantum information processing. As a leading platform, neutral atom arrays rely on fluorescence readout, requiring short-exposure schemes to mitigate heating and atom loss. However, a fundamental challenge arises in the single-phot… [Phys. Rev. Lett. 137, 013601] Published Tue Jun 30, 2026

item.title: 用于近红外单光子单像素成像的 Hessian 稀疏约束自监督网络
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yao Wang, Muchen Zhu, Linjun Zhai, Huiyuan Zhang, Junnan Chen, Yiming Yu, Zhaohua Yang, Baolei Liu, Fan Wang
该文提出 Hessian 稀疏约束自监督网络 HS3N，用于超低光照下的近红外单光子单像素成像。方法将单像素成像的物理前向模型与未训练神经网络结合，并同时引入稀疏先验和基于 Hessian 的结构约束，以在抑制光子噪声的同时保持结构保真度与连续性。模拟和实验结果表明，HS3N 可在极低光子通量下实现高保真重建，并有望提升实时成像能力。

item.title: 利用辛神经网络的 δf 粒子-网格方法非线性控制变量
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Victor Fournet, Martin Campos Pinto, Emmanuel Franck, Victor Michel-Dansac
该文提出一种用于静电等离子体动力学模拟的新型 δf 粒子-网格方法，其中作为控制变量的主体密度由辛神经网络演化。辛神经网络被用来近似反向流，并通过粒子轨道进行训练；作者还引入了将空间周期性直接编码进网络结构的周期型 SympNet。该方法在 Vlasov-Poisson 系统的 1D1V 和 3D3V 数值算例中得到验证。

item.title: NQS-Agent：面向神经网络量子态的健康感知代理式超参数优化
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jia-Qi Wang, Xiao-Qi Han, Ze-Feng Gao, Rong-Qiang He, Zhong-Yi Lu
该工作提出开源软件框架 NQS-Agent，用于神经网络量子态计算中的健康感知超参数优化。其流程监测能量轨迹、识别破坏性优化事件、提前终止不稳定任务、调整学习率计划、从安全检查点恢复，并用异常感知评分排序候选模型。作者在方格 Heisenberg J1-J2 模型的残差卷积 NQS 上验证该方法，显示其可优于人工调参的 aCNN 参考基线，并发现参数量匹配但结构不同的宽浅型竞争候选。

item.title: 基于在线训练机器学习原子间势的高效巨正则全局优化
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jon Eunan Quinlivan Dominguez, Mads-Peter Verner Christiansen, Konstantin M. Neyman, Bøjrk Hammer, Albert Bruix
该工作面向反应环境下纳米结构材料的稳定结构与化学态预测，提出一种计算高效的巨正则全局优化算法。算法利用基于稀疏高斯过程回归和 SOAP 描述符的在线训练机器学习原子间势，显著减少全局搜索中所需的第一性原理能量评估。作者还将从头算热力学框架并入候选结构评价，使优化过程能够根据给定压力、温度等反应条件近似 Gibbs 能并执行环境感知搜索。

item.title: A Trainable-by-Parts Operator Learning Framework: Bridging DeepONet and Karhunen-Loeve Expansions for Large-Scale Applications
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Christian Munoz, Alexandre Tartakovsky
arXiv:2606.28519v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Training operator-learning models for large-scale problems governed by partial differential equations (PDEs) is challenging due to the curse of dimensionality, memory constraints, and limited training data. These challenges arise in many scientific and engineering applications, including subsurface flow, climate modeling, and geological carbon storage (GCS). In this work, we propose a scalable operator-learning framework based on the Karhunen-Loeve Deep Neural Network (KL-DNN) and demonstrate its performance for modeling GCS. The model is trained on a dataset comprising 100 samples of large-scale simulations in a three-dimensional domain with 1.7 million cells and 50 time steps. The KL-DNN method constructs latent spaces using low-rank singu…

item.title: Towards Improved Anomaly Detection for Cloud Cybersecurity via Graph Neural Networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Manu Nandan, TJ Jaymes, Michael Brautbar, Edward Raff
arXiv:2606.28923v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Detecting security threats in an organization's cloud computing environment has become necessary due to the increased reliance on cloud infrastructure. Logging of all cloud computing events enables investigation into any incidents after they are detected. Automated detection of threats using the logs based on heuristics or anomaly detection could result in a high false positive rate due to its relatively static nature. In this article, we present an industrial case study of a self-supervised learning method using graph neural networks applied to AWS CloudTrail logs to surface suspicious events for analyst review. The model produces an anomaly score for each event and dynamically adapts to changes in the organization without requiring periodi…

item.title: 基于深度学习的烟叶成熟度智能识别方法研究
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Longfei Wang, Ruixin Zhao, Geng Zhu, Fei Zhang, Junjie Dai
该研究面向复杂田间环境和冠层遮挡条件下的烟叶成熟度自动评估，提出结合专用Vision Transformer骨干网络与卷积块注意力模块的作物监测框架。方法引入MSRCR进行光照归一化，并在HSV与L*a*b*颜色空间中提取多尺度特征，以表征叶绿素退化和叶面黄化等成熟度指标。实验显示，ViT-CBAM模型可在未熟、成熟和过熟三类阶段上达到0.942 mAP，并以45 FPS实现实时推理，适合资源受限场景部署。

item.title: Slip-Aware Wheel Odometry for 4-Wheeled Skid-Steer Mobile Robots Using a Compact 1-D Convolutional Neural Network
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Prasad Prabhu, Vincent Linish Dsouza
This paper presents SlipOdometryNet, a compact 1-D residual convolutional neural network with focal slip-weighted training for slip-aware wheel odometry of 4-wheeled skid-steer mobile robots. The proposed model replaces the kinematic wheel-odometry estimator using only wheel encoders and commanded velocities, without requiring an IMU, camera, LiDAR, or explicit friction parameters. The architecture comprises 176,450 parameters with sub-millisecond GPU inference (0.4 ms per window) at 50 Hz. Training and evaluation are performed in ROS 2 Jazzy with Gazebo Harmonic across four friction conditions spanning a six-fold variation in Coulomb friction coefficients, two of which are unseen during training. The proposed method achieves a 51–94% reduction in Absolute Trajectory Error (ATE) and a 78–…

item.title: 发生相变的相互作用体系中逆统计问题的学习与检验
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Stefano Bae, Dario Bocchi, Luca Maria Del Bono, Luca Leuzzi
该工作围绕从数据反推相互作用统计物理模型参数的逆问题，系统介绍并比较最大似然、最大伪似然和平均场三类主要推断方法。作者将这些方法应用于多个发生相变的经典体系，包括有序和无序 Ising 模型、矢量 Potts 模型以及规则晶格和随机图上的 Blume-Capel 模型。论文同时提供可复现实验和拓展至新体系的代码库，兼具方法综述与基准测试性质。

item.title: MALOQ：面向量子输运的算符大规模加速学习
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Manasa Kaniselvan, Alexander Maeder, Denghui Lu, Alexandros Nikolaos Ziogas, Mathieu Luisier
本文介绍 MALOQ，一个用于训练和预测电子结构矩阵的应用框架，可面向由少数到 10 万原子组成、采用大基组并覆盖多种元素的体系。该方法基于 SO(2) 等变骨干网络，提供处理高阶哈密顿矩阵数据的定制数据核，以及可扩展的原子图边级分布策略。在当前最大规模分子哈密顿量数据集上训练时，相比按分子分布的框架每轮训练时间降低超过 30%，并支持任意尺寸材料图的推理；作者还在 Alps 超算上展示了 3000–12000 原子、最高 192 GPU 训练和 256 GPU 推理的可扩展性。

item.title: Modelling Emotional Memory in Children with Tensor Networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Henry Groves, Lucia F. Jackson, Barbara-Anne Robertson, Jonte R. Hance
arXiv:2606.28470v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We demonstrate how emotional valence influences the order-dependent structure of children's recognition memory: correct recall of a sequence of emotionally-valenced toys depended not just on the valence of a given toy itself, but also on the valence of the toys shown before and after it. Whilst standard psychological models confirm that order-dependence differs across an event (a set of toys shown in sequence), accuracy is low and the model does not reflect how memory for an emotional object influences others in the set. A classical tensor network model factoring in valence is able to achieve a 77.98% accuracy in modelling the results of the study. While not strictly a ``quantum cognition'' model, this massive increase in accuracy shows the…

item.title: Neural Canonical Transformation for the Spectra of Fluxional Molecule CH5+
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ruisi Wang, Qi Zhang, Lei Wang
arXiv:2509.23731v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Protonated methane, CH5+, is a highly fluxional molecule with large spatial motions of the hydrogen atoms. The molecule's anharmonic effects and the delocalized wavefunction of the hydrogen atoms significantly affect the excitation spectrum of the molecule. The neural canonical transformation (NCT) approach, which we previously developed to solve the vibrational spectra of molecules and solids, is a powerful method that effectively treats nuclear quantum effects and anharmonicities. Using NCT with wavefunctions in atomic coordinates rather than normal coordinates, we successfully calculate the ground and excited states of CH5+. We found that the wavefunctions for the ground state, as well as for low- and high-energy excited states, show…

item.title: 网络中的鲁棒秘密存储
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Vinko Zlatić
该文研究如何在网络上分布式存储安全信息，并提出相应的形式化框架。问题被表述为一个鲁棒性泛函优化：同时权衡网络退化过程下的可存活性与对抗性攻破下的安全性。作者用最小信息承载子图精确表示重构事件，并据此构造无需全局网络知识的半局域优化方法；在某一极限情形下，该鲁棒性泛函可自然映射为有效自旋哈密顿量。

item.title: 用于经典张量网络模拟的影子层析
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jiace Sun, Garnet Kin-Lic Chan
作者将量子计算中的影子层析思想改造用于经典计算机上的张量网络态观测量估计，并分别发展了适用于自旋/玻色体系和费米体系的策略。根据任务和体系类型，该方法相对于常规采样可带来 O(N) 到 O(N³⁾ 的标度改进；对于长程相互作用哈密顿量期望值估计，在固定相对蒙特卡洛误差下可达到整体 O(1) 标度（忽略对数因子）。此外，影子估计量在变分优化中给出比标准蒙特卡洛估计更稳定的观测量梯度，并通过二维长程海森堡模型等算例展示了实际优势。

item.title: 反应网络的合并降维：一般参数与临界参数
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Justin Eilertsen, Valery G. Romanovski, Santiago Schnell, Sebastian Walcher
该文研究参数依赖质量作用反应网络的线性合并降维，区分一般参数区域和临界参数区域。作者证明，在一般参数下，精确线性合并只产生“显然”的降维形式，即去除非反应物种或沿化学计量守恒量投影；该刻画还推广到具有乘积形式动力学的网络，包括 Michaelis-Menten 和 Hill 型速率律。对于质量作用系统，文中进一步给出寻找临界参数集合的算法，将非平凡合并映射的判定化为有限多项式方程组，并通过自复制系统和双通路酶机制展示方法适用性。

item.title: Functional and Network PHAs via Stereoselective Polymerization and Tailored Post‐Transformation
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Ruirui Li, Yingluo Zhao, Jun‐Jie Tian, Ethan C. Quinn, Yunpeng Gao, Maëlle T. Gace, Eugene Y.‐X. Chen
Angewandte Chemie International Edition, EarlyView.
